title: It seems podman doesn't read "remote" in config by now
body:
### Discussed in https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/12864
Originally posted by **hsupu** January 14, 2022 I set my `containers.conf` as below but it didn't work. ```conf [engine] remote = true ``` I believe that the `podman` should behave like `podman -r` by default if the remote flag is on. This feature is [documented](https://www.mankier.com/5/containers.conf). I found the code is [here](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/eeb76db0fd0dc2a1115c2f2ad12c82eadbc62509/vendor/github.com/containers/common/pkg/config/config.go#L342) ```go // EngineConfig contains configuration options used to set up a engine runtime type EngineConfig struct { // Indicates whether the application should be running in Remote mode Remote bool `toml:"remote,omitempty"` } ``` I saw there is another struct (that looked critical) contains a `Remote bool`. It's [here](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/eeb76db0fd0dc2a1115c2f2ad12c82eadbc62509/pkg/domain/entities/engine.go#L45) ```go // PodmanConfig combines the defaults and settings from the file system with the // flags given in os.Args. Some runtime state is also stored here. type PodmanConfig struct { *config.Config Remote bool // Connection to Podman API Service will use RESTful API } ``` I found the working function in code is `IsRemote` which is defined [here](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/0144f46ac5067196019225430847691502d74da7/cmd/podman/registry/remote.go). This feature, read remote flag from config file, does it not work by design, or it's just under development so I maybe could try to fix it ? Thanks!
